Off Calendar Jun-17-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day for hearing on third party examinee Jeffrey Raymond Lee's Motion for a Protective Order and for an Order Continuing the Examination Date.
Dept: 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Proceedings Not Reported.

David J. Yang, Esq. appeared for third party examinee Jeffrey Raymond Lee, who was not present for this afternoon's proceedings.
No appearance by Assignee, Eric Tong or his attorney of record, John Chu.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules as follows on the sixty-eight individual requests contained in Eric Tong's request for production of documents to Jeffrey Raymond Lee:

Request #1-Granted; Request #2-Granted; Request #3-Granted; Request #4-Denied; Request #5-Denied; Request #6-Denied; Request #7-Granted; Request #8-Granted; Request -Granted; Request #10-Denied; Request #11-Granted; Request #12-Denied; Request #13-Granted; Request #14-Denied; Request #15-Denied; Request #16-Granted; Request #17-Granted; Request #18-Granted; Request #19-Denied; Request #20-Granted; Request #21-Granted; Request #22-Denied; Request #23-Denied; Request #24-Granted; Request #25-Granted; Request #26-Denied; Request #27-Granted; Request #28-Denied; Request #29-Denied; Request #29-Denied; Request #30-Denied; Request #31-Denied; Request #32-Denied; Request #33-Granted; Request #34-Denied; Request #35-Granted; Request #36-Granted; Request #37-Denied; Request #38-Denied; Request #39-Denied; Request #40-Denied; Request #41-Denied; Request #42-Granted; Request #43-Granted; Request #44-Denied; Request #45-Granted; Request #46-Denied; Request #47-Denied; Request #48-Denied; Request #49-Denied; Request #50-Denied; Request #51-Denied; Request #52-Denied; Request #53-Denied; Request #54-Granted; Request #55-Denied; Request #56-Denied; Request #57-Denied; Request #58-Denied; Request #59-Denied; Request #60-Granted; Request #61-Granted; Request #62-Granted; Request #63-Denied; Request #64-Denied; Request #65-Denied; Request #66-Denied; Request #67-Denied; and Request #68-Denied.

Additionally, the Court further RULES that:
(1) Non-Party Jeffrey Raymond Lee's Motion for a Protective Order and for Order Continuing the Examination date is GRANTED;
(2) Non-Party Jeffrey Raymond is not obligated to produce any documents rquested in the Civil Subpoena for Personal Appearance and Production of Documents, except the ones Ordered by this Court to be produced as set forth above;
(3) Assignee Eric Tong's future examination of Jeffrey Raymond Lee (if any) is limited to all documents that Jeffrey Raymond Lee has produced, as well as the documents this Court Ordered to be produced at today's hearing; and
(4) Assignee Eric Tong's examination of Jeffrey Raymond Lee will held on June 27, 2019 in Department 514, and the June 20, 2019 examination date is VACATED.

Proposed Order Granting Protective Order and Order Continuing Examination Date was submitted to and signed by the Court.
